title: Vacancy for Teacher at NIT Trichy

jsonLd.title: Vacancy for Teacher at NIT Trichy
jsonLd.description:
NIT Trichy, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Teacher for our Aurangabad operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About NIT Trichy:
NIT Trichy is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in Educational Technology
• Proficiency in Special Education
• Proficiency in LMS Platforms
• Proficiency in Pedagogy
• Proficiency in Content Creation
• Proficiency in Communication Skills
• Proficiency in Data Analysis

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Annual performance appraisal
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Life and accident insurance
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Referral bonus program
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Aurangabad, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with NIT Trichy!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
